ddls:
CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the guest */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the guest */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the guest */,
  "anniversary" TEXT /* Anniversary of the guest */,
  "member_since" TEXT /* Date the guest became a member */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the guest */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any dietary restrictions or allergies */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the location */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the location */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the location */,
  "cuisine_type" TEXT /* Type of cuisine served at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each table */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the table is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the table */,
  "is_accessible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the table is accessible for guests with disabilities */,
  "is_smoking" INTEGER /* Indicates if the table is in a smoking area */,
  "is_outdoor" INTEGER /* Indicates if the table is outdoors */,
  "last_cleaned" TEXT /* Last time the table was cleaned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the table (e.g., available, occupied, reserved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest making the reservation */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the table reserved */,
  "reservation_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the reservation */,
  "num_guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests in the reservation */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Special requests for the reservation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reservation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reservation was last updated */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation if applicable */,
  "no_show_reason" TEXT /* Reason for no-show if applicable */,
  "guest_preferences" TEXT /* Specific preferences for the reservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Date and time the status was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the server */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the server */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the server */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the server */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the server was hired */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the server */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the server (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server assigned */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the table assigned */,
  "assignment_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the assignment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the assignment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_assignments_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_assignments_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest on the waitlist */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the table being waited for */,
  "waitlist_time" TEXT /* Date and time the guest was added to the waitlist */,
  "estimated_wait_time" TEXT /* Estimated wait time for the guest */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the waitlist entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservation associated with the order */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server who took the order */,
  "order_time" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the menu item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the menu item (e.g., appetizer, main course) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the menu item image */,
  "is_vegetarian" INTEGER /* Indicates if the menu item is vegetarian */,
  "is_gluten_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the menu item is gluten-free */,
  "is_vegan" INTEGER /* Indicates if the menu item is vegan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the order item */,
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item associated with the order item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the order item */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_menu_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("menu_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "payment_time" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was made */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount paid */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, server) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservation associated with the analytics entry */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the table associated with the analytics entry */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server associated with the analytics entry */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the reservation */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest associated with the analytics entry */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average rating for the reservation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the analytics entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guest_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest with the preference */,
  "preference" TEXT /* Preference of the guest (e.g., seating location, menu item) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guest_preferences_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id")
)
